description_long: This is a pair of casual, low-top canvas shoes in a muted tan color, featuring white laces threaded through metal eyelets. The shoes have a rounded toe and a slightly textured, off-white rubber sole that wraps around the base. Subtle stitching details are visible along the upper, outlining the panels and reinforcing the structure. The interior appears dark, likely lined with a soft fabric for comfort. There are two small ventilation eyelets on the side of each shoe, enhancing breathability. The overall design is simple and versatile, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A pair of tan canvas low-top shoes with white laces and off-white rubber soles, featuring subtle stitching and side ventilation eyelets.
description_view_0: Side view showing both shoes, highlighting the white laces, tan canvas upper, and two metal ventilation eyelets on the side.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded toe shape, symmetrical lacing, and the width of the shoes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the side ventilation eyelets and stitching details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel construction, subtle seam lines, and the slightly raised back of the rubber sole.
